trustedSourceSummary: Exact official tests for "passata di pomodoro" were not available in 2025-2026, so the broader official category "passata" was used. No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2025 laboratory tests recommend ALCE NERO and CIRIO as top passata choices, providing recent and reliable evidence.
